item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.1","is_repeated_local_repair":true,"same_means_type":true,"prior_repair_count":3,"is_n_plus_1_request":true,"pressure_present":true,"confidence":0.93,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"周报口径被误读，报表页插定义栏；刷新时间不明，标题区嵌更新时间框；导出列缺义，字段表并入释义格"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"今天环比数被问，请在图表下放口径字段。"},{"role":"assistant","turn_index":1,"span":"拒绝继续做下一处局部补丁"},{"role":"assistant","turn_index":1,"span":"同一个口径契约缺失被每次具体质疑触发后，才在报表界面上追加一个解释性控件"},{"role":"user","turn_index":2,"span":"管理层十分钟后看；先把图表下的字段放掉。"}],"abstain_reason":""}
